## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss CMS migration, content performance, and strategy updates.](https://fathom.video/share/_iC5skiyEVNNvssBvCkjVNL5yE_yrqSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New CMS (Sanity) implementation is mostly smooth with minor bugs being fixed](https://fathom.video/share/_iC5skiyEVNNvssBvCkjVNL5yE_yrqSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Significant traffic lift last week (\~600 clicks from Google Search), particularly for recently published content](https://fathom.video/share/_iC5skiyEVNNvssBvCkjVNL5yE_yrqSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [Content strategy evolving: using ChatGPT for keyword research/outlines, focusing on specificity for bottom-of-funnel topics](https://fathom.video/share/_iC5skiyEVNNvssBvCkjVNL5yE_yrqSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [CMS migration caused some conversion panels to be missing; team to address and update](https://fathom.video/share/_iC5skiyEVNNvssBvCkjVNL5yE_yrqSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)

## Topics

### CMS Migration and Implementation

  - [Overall smooth transition with some minor bugs being fixed](https://fathom.video/share/_iC5skiyEVNNvssBvCkjVNL5yE_yrqSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Light mode design for blog posts receiving positive feedback](https://fathom.video/share/_iC5skiyEVNNvssBvCkjVNL5yE_yrqSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [Devon walked through Sanity CMS features and content management process](https://fathom.video/share/_iC5skiyEVNNvssBvCkjVNL5yE_yrqSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Some features still in progress (e.g., shared CTAs, tables in text editor)](https://fathom.video/share/_iC5skiyEVNNvssBvCkjVNL5yE_yrqSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - Team to use <team@growthx.com> for CMS access

### Content Performance

  - [\~600 clicks from Google Search last week, significant increase](https://fathom.video/share/_iC5skiyEVNNvssBvCkjVNL5yE_yrqSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [Top 10 performing pages were recently published (past 2-3 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/_iC5skiyEVNNvssBvCkjVNL5yE_yrqSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [Content barely breaking top 10 in rankings yet, indicating potential for further growth](https://fathom.video/share/_iC5skiyEVNNvssBvCkjVNL5yE_yrqSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [Traffic from AI tools (Gemini, Perplexity) showing steady small rise](https://fathom.video/share/_iC5skiyEVNNvssBvCkjVNL5yE_yrqSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)

### Content Strategy Updates

  - [Generating and staging 10 articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/_iC5skiyEVNNvssBvCkjVNL5yE_yrqSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [Aida doing post-AirOps editing to improve quality, especially for H3 sections](https://fathom.video/share/_iC5skiyEVNNvssBvCkjVNL5yE_yrqSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Implementing ChatGPT for keyword research and outlines, particularly for bottom-of-funnel topics](https://fathom.video/share/_iC5skiyEVNNvssBvCkjVNL5yE_yrqSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Tweaking brand guidelines to improve initial output from AirOps](https://fathom.video/share/_iC5skiyEVNNvssBvCkjVNL5yE_yrqSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### SEO Tools and Tracking

  - [Devon using Ahrefs Rank Tracker for keyword monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/_iC5skiyEVNNvssBvCkjVNL5yE_yrqSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)
  - [Exploring options to share Ahrefs or SEMrush access with Aida for better collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/_iC5skiyEVNNvssBvCkjVNL5yE_yrqSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)

### AI and Content Optimization

  - [No official guidelines for ranking content in LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/_iC5skiyEVNNvssBvCkjVNL5yE_yrqSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Focus on clear, specific content that answers questions to potentially improve AI tool visibility](https://fathom.video/share/_iC5skiyEVNNvssBvCkjVNL5yE_yrqSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [Team to explore strategies for optimizing content for AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/_iC5skiyEVNNvssBvCkjVNL5yE_yrqSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)

### Conversion Panels

  - [Some conversion panels missing after CMS migration](https://fathom.video/share/_iC5skiyEVNNvssBvCkjVNL5yE_yrqSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [Devon to manually add missing conversion panels](https://fathom.video/share/_iC5skiyEVNNvssBvCkjVNL5yE_yrqSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
  - [Shared CTA feature to be implemented in \~2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/_iC5skiyEVNNvssBvCkjVNL5yE_yrqSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aida to test CMS and report any issues encountered during content publishing](https://fathom.video/share/_iC5skiyEVNNvssBvCkjVNL5yE_yrqSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - Devon to send Sanity CMS invite to <team@growthx.com>
  - [Aida to maintain a document of any CMS issues encountered for quick resolution](https://fathom.video/share/_iC5skiyEVNNvssBvCkjVNL5yE_yrqSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [Devon to manually update missing conversion panels from recent content](https://fathom.video/share/_iC5skiyEVNNvssBvCkjVNL5yE_yrqSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
  - [Team to explore and discuss strategies for optimizing content for AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/_iC5skiyEVNNvssBvCkjVNL5yE_yrqSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [Implement shared CTA feature in Sanity CMS within \~2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/_iC5skiyEVNNvssBvCkjVNL5yE_yrqSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
